steps.prompt: Now find these three — something unexpected just happened, something exciting is coming and you can't wait, and someone feels a little shy.
Last ones — feeling a bit embarrassed, feeling really good, waving hello, and feeling pleased.

items.clue: This face has a big smile. Everything feels good. Find it!
items.acknowledgement: Happy! What makes you feel happy?

items.clue: This face has tears. Something didn't go the way they wanted.
items.acknowledgement: Sad. Feeling sad is normal — everyone feels sad sometimes.

items.clue: This is a big hot feeling. Your face goes red and you might want to shout. What do you think it is? Find it!
items.acknowledgement: Angry! When you feel angry, try this — breathe in slowly... and breathe out. That helps.

items.clue: This face isn't sure if something bad is going to happen. They keep thinking about it.
items.acknowledgement: Worried. Talking about worries helps make them smaller.

items.clue: Find the face that shows someone is feeling unwell.
items.acknowledgement: Poorly. When you feel poorly, rest and cuddles help.
